stonetop.summary: A blood-roused horror chained beneath the lake, a gift of the Things Below.

system.concept: A blood-roused horror chained beneath the lake, a gift of the Things Below.
system.description: It was a gift from the Things Below, a present to some Barrow Builder tyrant. They bound it fast and kept it in the waters nearby, feeding it a steady diet of screaming, bleeding victims. It's still out there, sleeping for years or decades at a time, roused by copious amounts of fresh blood in the lake — or by a few drops somewhere nearby.
